meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Overcome Slow Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing hours to bugs. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your freelance development workflow and ship high-quality SaaS faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, pivot from manual debugging to AI-assisted root cause analysis. By integrating Antigravity for architectural context and Claude Code for CLI-based iteration, you automate the diagnosis of complex bugs, reducing your mean-time-to-repair by up to 70% while maintaining professional code quality standards.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you’re trapped in a dependency hell that shouldn't exist. You’ve spent three hours chasing a ghost in the stack trace, and your hourly rate is plummeting with every minute of manual debugging. The traditional developer experience is broken; it’s too slow, too manual, and fundamentally misaligned with the speed of modern freelance delivery.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started orchestrating it? By treating your IDE as an intelligent partner rather than a text editor, you can move from reactive troubleshooting to proactive architectural resolution. It is time to reclaim your time and transform your workflow into a high-velocity engine that delivers premium results without the burnout.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, the AI needs to understand your project architecture to avoid hallucinations. Define the scope clearly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify potential bottlenecks or anti-patterns causing performance degradation.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs into the AI to pinpoint the exact line of failure without manually scanning thousands of lines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Parse the following error log and map it to the relevant file paths in the codebase. Identify the root cause.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze error.log and suggest a fix'

steps.title: Isolated Refactoring
steps.description: Apply fixes in an isolated manner to ensure that solving one bug doesn't trigger a regression in another module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified function for better error handling while maintaining the current API contract.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/utils/db.ts --prompt 'Apply the refactored error handling logic'

steps.title: Automated Unit Testing
steps.description: Generate tests for the fix before deploying to ensure long-term stability and client peace of mind.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Jest unit tests for the newly refactored function covering edge cases.

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Use AI to verify the production readiness of your fix against your deployment pipeline requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final code changes against production best practices for scalability and security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm run build && npm run lint'

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeignore file to keep the AI focused on your business logic rather than heavy node_modules.
Chain your prompts: Ask the AI to summarize the fix before applying it to ensure you agree with the architectural direction.
Use Claude Code's 'terminal' mode to execute multi-step CLI operations that require environment variables.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base' folder in your project that the AI can reference for specific client coding standards.
Never accept the first AI-generated patch; always ask it to 'critique its own solution for potential side effects' before applying.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin integrating AI-assisted unit test generation into your CI/CD pipeline to automate quality assurance for all future client projects.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to ship faster than your peers and command higher rates. Stop debugging manually and start building intelligently. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
